CREATE TABLE voyages (id INT PRIMARY KEY, arrival_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO voyages (id, arrival_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 10:00:00');
INSERT INTO voyages (id, arrival_time) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 15:30:00');
INSERT INTO voyages (id, arrival_time) VALUES (3, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 20:45:00');
SELECT * FROM voyages WHERE arrival_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 10:00:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voyages WHERE arrival_time > TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 10:00:00';
SELECT * FROM voyages WHERE arrival_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM voyages WHERE arrival_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 09:00:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 15:00:00';
SELECT id FROM voyages WHERE arrival_time IN (SELECT arrival_time FROM voyages WHERE arrival_time < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT v1.id, v1.arrival_time FROM voyages v1 JOIN voyages v2 ON v1.arrival_time < v2.arrival_time;
SELECT id, arrival_time FROM voyages ORDER BY arrival_time DESC;
CREATE TABLE voyage_details (voyage_id INT, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (voyage_id) REFERENCES voyages(id));
INSERT INTO voyage_details (voyage_id, description) VALUES (1, 'First voyage.');
INSERT INTO voyage_details (voyage_id, description) VALUES (2, 'Second voyage.');
SELECT vd.description FROM voyage_details vd JOIN voyages v ON vd.voyage_id = v.id WHERE v.arrival_time > TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:00:00';
SELECT v.id, v.arrival_time, COUNT(vd.description) AS detail_count FROM voyages v LEFT JOIN voyage_details vd ON v.id = vd.voyage_id GROUP BY v.id, v.arrival_time;
SELECT MAX(arrival_time) FROM voyages;
SELECT id FROM voyages WHERE arrival_time = (SELECT MAX(arrival_time) FROM voyages);
CREATE TABLE delayed_voyages AS SELECT * FROM voyages WHERE arrival_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
SELECT * FROM delayed_voyages WHERE arrival_time IS NOT NULL;
